title: RoadmapUpdated payload
description: Emitted by every roadmap-mutating action handler (roadmap_set, roadmap_insert, roadmap_update, roadmap_mark_reassessed) after the mutation lands. The arcreview substrate listener (chain arc-close-filing-review-substrate-listener-wiring T4) subscribes to this type — every emission triggers a session-scoped review fire for the project's most-recently-active session, debouncer-coalesced so multi-step roadmap edits in one turn yield one review. roadmap_preview_set is a dry-run and does NOT emit. The schema reflects only the action shape; the affected roadmap state is queryable via roadmap_list at the row's commit time + the row's caused_by_event_id.

action_kind.description: Which roadmap-mutating action emitted this event. The substrate listener treats all kinds identically (any roadmap change is a trigger); downstream telemetry projections can distinguish bulk replacement (set) from single-row mutations (insert / update) when computing edit-cadence metrics. Cascade-removal on chain close / task close goes through the ChainClosed / TaskCompleted / TaskCancelled events (the projection fold reacts), not a RoadmapUpdated emit.

positions.description: Affected positions. For 'set', the full list of positions after replacement; for 'insert' / 'update', the single position. 'mark_reassessed' has no positions and omits the field.

ref_kind.description: ref_kind of the affected row when action_kind is 'insert' or 'update'. NULL for 'set' (multiple rows changed) and 'mark_reassessed'.

ref_slug.description: ref_slug of the affected row when action_kind is 'insert' or 'update'. NULL for 'set' and 'mark_reassessed'.

item_count.description: For 'set': how many items the new roadmap contains. For other actions: null.

items.description: T5-roadmap additive bump (2026-05-21): per-position layout for 'set' / 'insert' / 'update' / 'delete' so the projection fold can reconstruct proj_roadmap_view from the event payload alone. NULL for 'mark_reassessed'.
